ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND( NOT($Profile.Name = "System Administrator"), /* Allow Admin */
CASE( Stage__c, "Booked", 1, "Agreement", 2, "Land Registration", 3, "Demands & Progressive Collections", 4, "Registration", 5, "Possession / Handover", 6, "Customer Service & Complaints", 7, "Cancellation", 8, 0 ) < CASE( PRIORVALUE(Stage__c), "Booked", 1, "Agreement", 2, "Land Registration", 3, "Demands & Progressive Collections", 4, "Registration", 5, "Possession / Handover", 6, "Customer Service & Complaints", 7, "Cancellation", 8, 0 ) )
